text_excerpt: Blog Archive - Chris Evans MP Chris Evans MP About Parliament Archives & History Campaigns & Issues Help & Advice Useful Info Blog Archive Contact Chris Evans MP About Parliament Archives & History Campaigns & Issues Help & Advice Useful Info Blog Archive Contact Chris Evans MP MEMBER OF PARLIAMENT FOR CAERPHILLY Get in touch 9 Chris Evans MP MEMBER OF PARLIAMENT FOR CAERPHILLY Get in touch 9 Latest News Please find below an archive of news and updates about my work as Member of Parliament for Caerphilly. Remembering our war dead on VJ Day 80 The Member of Parliament for Caerphilly and Commonwealth War Graves Commissioner, Chris Evans, has spoken of the importance of remembering our war dead on the 80th Anniversary of VJ Day. Victory over Japan happened 80 years ago on 15th August 1945. On this day, the... Islwyn Archive Please find below an archive of news and updates from my work as Member of Parliament for Islwyn (2010 – 2024). Caerphilly MP objects to Maesycwmmer McDonalds Plan The Member of Parliament for Caerphilly, Chris Evans, has today submitted an objection letter opposing plans to build a new McDonalds drive-thru restaurant in Maesycwmmer. The planned development, which is off Main Road (A472) Maesycwmmer, would see a new McDonalds... Local MP wins prestigious book award A book authored by the Member of Parliament for Caerphilly, Chris Evans, has won an award at the tenth Westminster Book Awards. The book, The Football Batallions: The Elite Footballers Who Fought in the Great War, won in the category of Best Non-Fiction or Fiction by... Caerphilly MP to meet with UK Minister after ‘Owain’s Law’ debate Chris Evans, the Member of Parliament for Caerphilly, and Ellie James will meet with Ashley Dalton MP, Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State for Public Health and Prevention at the UK Government, to discuss the Owain’s Law campaign. The Minister agreed to meet Mr.... Caerphilly MP secures Owain’s Law Debate in Parliament Chris Evans, the Member of Parliament for Caerphilly, has secured a Westminster Hall Debate in Parliament on the Owain’s Law campaign. The debate, which will be held in Parliament’s Westminster Hall at 9:30am on 7th January 2026, is on the motion ‘That this House has... Caerphilly MP joins Owain’s Law campaign Chris Evans, the Member of Parliament for Caerphilly, has joined the campaign for Owain’s Law after a meeting with Ellie James, Owain’s widow, in Parliament. Ellie James is campaigning for Owain’s Law which would require NHS hospitals freeze suitable brain tumour... Local MP shortlisted for Westminster Book Awards A book authored by the Member of Parliament for Caerphilly, Chris Evans MP, has been shortlisted for an award at the tenth Westminster Book Awards.
